sections.heading: TL;DR (Too Long; Didn't Read)
content: <ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• Agreement: By using Stretch Interval Timer, you agree to follow these Terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the App.
• Use: The App is provided for personal, non-commercial use only.
• Not medical advice: The App is a timer tool only. It does not provide medical, fitness, or health advice. Stretch safely and within your limits.
• Privacy: The App does not collect any personal data. See our Privacy Policy.
• Liability: The App is provided "as is." We're not liable for damages beyond what you've paid to use the App.
• Changes: We may update these Terms. Continuing to use the App means you accept the changes.
This summary doesn't replace the full Terms—read the full text for complete details.

sections.heading: Introduction
content: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your use of Stretch Interval Timer (the "App", "we", "us"). By installing or using the App, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the App.
Stretch Interval Timer is a simple timer for building and following timed stretch routines. It operates on your device and does not collect or transmit personal data to us.
If you have questions about these Terms, contact us.

sections.heading: Your Use of the Services
content: <ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">
• Licence. We grant you a personal, revocable, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to use the App on devices you own or control, in accordance with these Terms and the App Store rules.
• Personal use. The App is for personal, non-commercial use unless we agree otherwise in writing.
• Requirements. You are responsible for having a compatible device and a supported version of the operating system.
• Prohibited uses. You may not:
• Use the App for any illegal purpose
• Attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
• Distribute copies of the App without permission
• Remove or alter any copyright or proprietary notices

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
content: The App and all related software, designs, text, and graphics are owned by us or our licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws. Except for the limited licence above, no rights are granted to you. Apple, iOS, and other Apple marks are trademarks of Apple Inc.

sections.heading: Pricing, Payment & Refunds
content: The App is a paid download available through the Apple App Store. Payment processing (including taxes/VAT and currency conversion) is handled by Apple; we do not process payments or collect your payment details. There are no subscriptions or in-app purchases.

Refunds and cooling-off: Refunds (including any statutory right of withdrawal for digital content) are administered by Apple under the App Store's policies. To request a refund, contact Apple via https://reportaproblem.apple.com. We cannot issue refunds directly.

App Store terms & licence: Your purchase and use of the App are also governed by Apple's terms, including the Apple Media Services terms and Apple's Standard Licensed Application End User Licence Agreement. If there is any conflict between these Terms and Apple's terms regarding purchase, payment, or licensing, Apple's terms apply.

Price changes: We may change the price of the App for future purchases at any time. Price changes do not affect purchases already completed, and we do not offer price adjustments or credits for past purchases.

sections.heading: Privacy
content: Your use of the App is subject to our Privacy Policy, which explains that the App does not collect any personal data. Please read it carefully.

sections.heading: Disclaimers and Limitation of Liability
content: <ul class="list-disc list-outside mb-4 space-y-1 pl-5">

• No warranties. The App is provided "as is" and "as available". To the fullest extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties (express or implied), including fitness for a particular purpose, reliability, and availability.

• Not medical or fitness advice. The App is a timer tool only. It does not provide medical, physiotherapy, fitness, or health advice, and it does not assess whether a stretch or routine is safe or suitable for you. Always stretch within your own limits, stop if you feel pain or discomfort, and seek professional advice if you have an injury or medical condition.
• Your responsibility. You are responsible for safe and lawful use of the App, including how you configure and follow routines.
• Limitation. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we will not be liable for:
• any indirect, consequential, special, or punitive damages; or
• any loss of profits, data, goodwill, or opportunities;

• any injury or harm arising from stretching, exercise, or other physical activity you undertake while using the App; arising out of or in connection with your use of the App. Our total aggregate liability for all claims relating to the App shall not exceed the amount you paid (if any) to purchase the App.
• Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits liability where it would be unlawful to do so (e.g., for death or personal injury caused by negligence, or for fraud).

sections.heading: Termination
content: We may suspend or terminate your access to the App at any time if you breach these Terms, if required by law, or if we withdraw or materially change the App. You may stop using and uninstall the App at any time. Upon termination, the licence granted to you ends and you must cease use.

sections.heading: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
content: These Terms and any dispute or claim arising out of or in connection with them are governed by the laws of England and Wales, and the courts of England and Wales shall have exclusive jurisdiction. If you are a consumer in another country, you may have mandatory rights under your local laws which remain unaffected.

sections.heading: Changes to These Terms
content: We may update these Terms from time to time. Changes will be effective when posted or when the App notifies you. The "Last updated" date at the top will reflect the most recent version. If you continue to use the App after changes take effect, you agree to the updated Terms.

sections.heading: Contact Us
content: If you have questions about this policy or the App, please contact:
Email: hello@cumuluscoding.com
When emailing us, please include the app name first, followed by your subject in the email's subject line.
For example: Stretch Interval Timer - [Your Subject Here]
